title: Dimension Generator
description: Algorithmic member generation with machine-discoverable OpenAPI definitions, applicable to any dimension type. A generator exposes up to five capabilities as endpoints: /generate (paginated member production), /extent (boundary computation), /inverse (value-to-coordinate mapping; requires bijective:true), /search (query-based member discovery), and the optional hierarchical pair /children + /ancestors (requires Hierarchical conformance level). Capabilities are declared in the generator's OpenAPI specification.

type.description: Short identifier for well-known algorithms or full URI for custom generators.

oneOf.description: Well-known generator type. Resolves to a registered OGC Definition URI. 'static-tree' is a reference implementation type for in-memory hierarchical trees.
Full URI for custom generator definitions.

api.description: OpenAPI definition URI. REQUIRED for custom generators. Implicit (resolvable from type) for well-known types. Machine clients fetch this to discover all available endpoints and parameters.

parameters.description: Default input parameters for the algorithm, defined per JSON Schema 2020-12. Maps to the OpenAPI request schema. For hierarchical generators using 'leveled' strategy, individual hierarchy levels override these defaults via their own parameters object.

output.description: Type and structure of each generated member, defined per JSON Schema 2020-12. For recursive hierarchical generators, the output object SHOULD include the field named in hierarchy.parent_property, typed as string or null (null for root members).

bijective.description: true if the generator supports inverse operations (Invertible conformance level). Exposes /inverse endpoint: maps a raw value back to the dimension member it belongs to. Most useful for deterministic generators such as temporal calendars and integer ranges.

search.description: Supported search protocols (Searchable / Similarity conformance levels). 'exact': exact match on member code. 'range': members within bounds. 'like': pattern match (fnmatch-style). 'vector': k-nearest-neighbour search by embedding similarity.

on_invalid.description: Item ingestion behavior when inverse validation fails (bijective generators only). 'reject': return 422, block ingestion. 'accept': allow the item and grow the dimension. 'warn': allow the item and emit a warning.

hierarchical.description: true if the generator supports Hierarchical conformance level: /children, /ancestors, and the optional ?parent= filter on /generate. SHOULD be true when the dimension declares a hierarchy property. The generator's /children endpoint follows the same pagination contract as /generate and mirrors the STAC API Children Extension (https://api.stacspec.org/v1.0.0-rc.2/children) applied to dimension members rather than collections.
